act_collect_ice.flavor: Send drones to scrape usable ice from shaded cuts.
act_collect_ice.label: Collect Ice
act_collect_ice.result_1: Drones return heavy. The tanks gain another day of *margin*.
act_collect_ice.result_2: Ice retrieved. Cloudy with particulate, but the filters will sort it.
act_collect_ice.result_3: Good haul. The shaded cuts still hold *more than expected*.
act_collect_ice.result_4: Drones back. The ice crackles as it warms into the hold.

act_decode_signal.flavor: Spend power on the recurring buried transmission.
act_decode_signal.label: Decode Signal
act_decode_signal.result_1: Another fragment resolves. The pattern is *deliberate*.
act_decode_signal.result_2: Partial decode. Numbers that might be coordinates.
act_decode_signal.result_3: The signal repeats with machine precision. It has been *waiting*.
act_decode_signal.result_4: More structure emerges. This was not meant for us. Or was it.

act_grow_rations.flavor: Coax calories from the first greenhouse trays.
act_grow_rations.label: Grow Rations
act_grow_rations.result_1: New growth. The trays smell like wet soil and something *green*.
act_grow_rations.result_2: Harvest ready in a few cycles. The lights do their patient work.
act_grow_rations.result_3: Okafor adjusted the nutrient mix. The kale is actually thriving.
act_grow_rations.result_4: Growth logged. Calories accrue slowly, but they accrue.

act_open_airlock.flavor: Prepare the final controlled exposure sequence.
act_open_airlock.label: Open Airlock
act_open_airlock.result_1: Airlock cycling. Pressure differential narrowing. Almost there.
act_open_airlock.result_2: The inner door holds. The outer door waits. Between them: a world.
act_open_airlock.result_3: Sequence initiated. Every sensor in the colony watches.
act_open_airlock.result_4: The airlock breathes. Outside and inside converge.

act_print_spares.flavor: Fabricate emergency parts from stored feedstock.
act_print_spares.label: Print Spares
act_print_spares.result_1: Part printed. Vasquez says it'll hold. That's high praise.
act_print_spares.result_2: The printer hums and delivers. Another seal, another day.
act_print_spares.result_3: Fabricated. The tolerances are tight enough. Barely.
act_print_spares.result_4: Spare ready. The feedstock bin drops. Worth it.

act_reroute_power.label: Reroute Power
act_reroute_power.result_1: Load balanced. The lights in Module 3 stop *flickering*.
act_reroute_power.result_2: Power redistributed. The heaters hold for another cycle.
act_reroute_power.result_3: Batteries rebalanced. No system is happy, but none are *dying*.
act_reroute_power.result_4: Rerouted. The grid hums at a frequency that means stability.

act_run_atmo_processor.flavor: Fire a slow terraforming processor cycle.
act_run_atmo_processor.label: Pulse Atmo Processor
act_run_atmo_processor.result_1: Processor pulsed. Atmospheric trace gases tick upward. Slowly.
act_run_atmo_processor.result_2: The processor exhales into the Martian sky. A small *defiance*.
act_run_atmo_processor.result_3: Cycle complete. The atmosphere thickens by a fraction no one feels.
act_run_atmo_processor.result_4: Pulsed. The sky doesn't look different yet. But it will.

act_seed_bioreactor.label: Seed Bioreactor
act_seed_bioreactor.result_1: The culture takes. Biomass readings climb overnight.
act_seed_bioreactor.result_2: Microbes stir in the dark. Life finds a way, *even here*.
act_seed_bioreactor.result_3: Bioreactor seeded. The colony's smallest workers begin their shift.
act_seed_bioreactor.result_4: Cultures established. The vats warm with something like purpose.

act_sift_regolith.flavor: Sort dust and rock for useful feedstock.
act_sift_regolith.label: Sift Regolith
act_sift_regolith.result_1: Iron oxide, silicates, trace metals. The usual harvest.
act_sift_regolith.result_2: The sifters churn. Feedstock bins tick upward.
act_sift_regolith.result_3: Regolith sorted. Something glints in the fines—probably feldspar.
act_sift_regolith.result_4: Sorted. The dust yields what it always yields. *Enough.*

act_stabilize_dome.flavor: Tune pressure and thermal flex in the outer dome.
act_stabilize_dome.label: Stabilize Dome
act_stabilize_dome.result_1: Dome pressure balanced. The membrane stops its restless creaking.
act_stabilize_dome.result_2: Thermal gradient smoothed. The dome settles like a held breath.
act_stabilize_dome.result_3: Flex compensators tuned. The structure finds its equilibrium.
act_stabilize_dome.result_4: Stabilized. The dome holds against the wind it was born to hold.

act_survey_crater.flavor: Map an old impact scar beyond the beacons.
act_survey_crater.label: Survey Crater
act_survey_crater.result_1: Survey complete. The crater wall shows layered stratigraphy.
act_survey_crater.result_2: Mapped. The southern rim has a sheltered overhang worth noting.
act_survey_crater.result_3: Drone returned with high-res terrain data. Some odd readings.
act_survey_crater.result_4: The crater is older than expected. Erosion patterns don't match.

act_vent_co2.flavor: Bleed carbon dioxide from the hab loop. The scrubbers cough awake.
act_vent_co2.label: Vent CO₂
act_vent_co2.result_1: The air thins toward *breathable*. Scrubbers groan their thanks.
act_vent_co2.result_2: CO₂ drops. Someone in the bunk module takes a *deeper breath*.
act_vent_co2.result_3: Vented. The hab exhales. Pressure ticks down, then steadies.
act_vent_co2.result_4: Scrubber cycle complete. The colony breathes a little *easier*.
